emails.subject: Cinergy
emails.body: Cinergy Dave, Quick update. It appears Art is on vacation all week. He is obviously not too concerned about the issue. I am still waiting to hear back from David Tang to see if they want one of their guys to go to the plant tomorrow. We could/should get FERC approval any day. This is the last real CP for this deal. Let me know if you and Cyrus hook up. Thanks, Don

emails.subject: Cinergy
emails.body: Don, I have left a message for Michael to call I am waiting. Regards Delainey Forwarded by David W Delainey/HOU/EES on 03/12/2001 03:15 PM Don Miller@ECT 03/12/2001 10:53 AM
